pr.title: Record: SP8192 + Pre-Quant TTT — val_bpb 1.07948 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Pre-quant AdamW TTT adapts the SP8192 base before SDClip/GPTQ compression so full-precision weights quantize after targeted fine-tuning.
techniques: Pre-quant AdamW TTT fine-tunes the EMA model prior to SDClip/GPTQ compression
SP8192 setup with skip gates, depth recurrence, and MuonEq-R optimizer as the shared backbone
SDClip/GPTQ quantizes embeddings and weights using std-scaled clipping for tighter compression
